name: unregister_proc
short_description: Unregister a previously registered Tcl proc.
full_help:
unregister_proc

Description: 
Unregister a previously registered Tcl proc.

Syntax: 
unregister_proc  [-quiet] [-verbose] <tasknm>

Returns: 
Nothing

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <tasknm>    Name of Tcl task to unregister.  The task must be wrapping a 
              proc.

Categories: 
Tools

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
